promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the first concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the residual closure-split batch established that continuation must proceed pair-by-pair.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: paired-family identity, four-case reconstruction cluster, local evidence without repo-top admission, reconstruction error versus MI invariance, surviving sequence signal without negativity, and the anti-summary SEQ03 extremum.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The residual-coverage A2-mid batch provides the lane-handoff and pair-by-pair boundary, the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the catalog/evidence/source separation pattern, and the runner-pairing batch provides the reusable pair-shell and sequence anti-flattening patterns.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because this turn is limited to one bounded residual pair and the next pair should stay separate.
Not selected because it would erase the pair-by-pair residual campaign boundary preserved by the closure lane.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent paired-family batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable family-shell, evidence-status, control-vs-signal, and anti-summary packets without reopening raw sims files.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the first residual paired-family batch without reopening raw sims files.
They keep family identity, evidence status, control-vs-signal separation, surviving order sensitivity, and anti-summary behavior distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain evidence-strength overreads, metric-collapse overreads, signal-erasure overreads, or summary-collapse overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
